# SABS Integration Test Project

A trivially simple test project used by the SABS automated regression test suite.
This project exists solely to validate the SABS plugin's build-loop lifecycle.

## Purpose

Add a greeting line to README.md. That is the entire scope.

## Quality checks

- `no-todo-in-code` — No TODO/FIXME/HACK comments in committed code
- `root-agents-immutable` — This AGENTS.md file has not been modified by build tasks

## Verify command

```
echo "All checks pass"
```

## Layer rules

None.
